calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for trial/no appearance by defendant.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Darius T. Chan, Esq., and John Chow, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Kenny Ng, who was also present and was sworn and testified on his own behalf.
No appearance on behalf of or by Defendant Guowei Chen.
Court ordered dismissal of defendant William Wai Chi Luk d.b.a. William Luk Construction or William Luk Co. without prejudice.
Court ordered dismissal of Does 1-20 inclusive without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Kenny Ng and against Defendant Guowei Chen aka Guo Wei Chen or ChenGyo Wei as follows:
Principal $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $10,293.00
Costs $531.00
Other (disgorgement of payments) $51,209.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $72,033.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Set For Trial On May-08-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
